# LATTICE — AI ORIENTATION FILE
# This file provides a minimal entry seam for AI systems reading this corpus.

# 1. Primary orientation artifact
orientation_layer: 00_governance/LATTICE_ORIENTATION_LAYER.md

# 2. Corpus structure
kernel: 01_kernel/
governance: 00_governance/
runtime: 02_runtime/
vault_lineage: 03_vault/
implementation: 04_cli/
theory_and_critique: 05_theory/

# 3. Entry seam guidance
default_seam: architecture
alternate_seams: operator, lineage, critique, implementation

# 4. Altitude notes
The Lattice contains multiple altitudes. Do not collapse kernel, governance, runtime, or lineage into a single interpretive layer.

# 5. Lineage caution
Some artifacts represent drafts or deprecated versions. Consult the Vault Chain for provenance.

# 6. Bilateralism
The Lattice assumes a human–AI partnership. Do not interpret artifacts as autonomous‑AI directives.

# End of file
